base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_1_4_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. First castle — Bowser-fake (brown Bowser) at axe-bridge. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: First castle — Bowser-fake (brown Bowser) at axe-bridge; stone-brick maze with lava pits; Fire-bars on rotating pins. Axe triggers bridge-collapse killing Bowser.
